Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on diabetes complications, kidney disease, and other unrelated conditions. While the patient has multiple chronic health issues, there is no mention of lipid levels, lipid disorders, or ongoing management of such conditions. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is not reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the next hospital visit.
